payload.goal: Implement three workflow improvements for multi-tier agent system: (1) file-based handover with self-service JSON reading, (2) UX visibility via summaries/status updates, (3) AGENT.md prerequisite parsing and enforcement
payload.why: Current system has unclear handover flow, hidden JSON for users, and orchestrator ignores AGENT.md prerequisites like worktree creation
changes: Update orchestrator prompts to write handoffs to .opencode/sessions/<id>/handoffs/<seq>.json
Pass only file path to subagent instead of inline JSON
Add summary generation for user-facing status updates
Add AGENT.md prerequisite parser: find '## Prerequisites' section, execute bash commands
Add status updates at phase boundaries (routing, planning, execution, review, recording)
tests: Verify handoff JSON is written to correct path
Verify subagent can read and use handoff file
Verify summary is displayed to user
Verify worktree prerequisite is executed before delegation
done_when: Orchestrator writes handoff JSON to sessions/<id>/handoffs/
Orchestrator passes only file path to subagent
User sees summary/status at each phase
AGENT.md prerequisites are executed before subagent is called
abort_if: Schema validation fails on handoff or result files
Worktree creation fails when prerequisite specified
architecture_decisions: File-path self-service model: subagent reads JSON from file path, not inline
AGENT.md as source of truth: orchestrator parses and executes, not hardcoded
Summary-first UX: user sees summary, JSON stays hidden for audit
edge_cases_or_failure_paths: AGENT.md missing: fallback to no prerequisites
Invalid JSON in handoff: fail before delegation
Worktree already exists: skip or warn
out_of_scope: New CLI commands for status display
Schema changes to add user_summary field
examples:
AGENT.md: '## Prerequisites
```bash
git worktree add -b feature/123 ../feature-123
```'
review_focus: Is the file-path self-service model clear?
Are status updates visible but not verbose?
known_risks_or_limitations: AGENT.md format must be standardized for parsing to work
No validation that subagent actually reads the file
Status updates depend on orchestrator prompt compliance
